label: Inglehart-Welzel cultural map basis

axes.label: Traditional <-> Secular-Rational
axes.interpretation_low: Traditional: religion, family ties, authority, deference
axes.interpretation_high: Secular-Rational: laicism, individual reasoning, weak deference

axes.label: Survival <-> Self-Expression
axes.interpretation_low: Survival: material security, in-group conformity, low trust

orthogonality_note: TS and SE axes are postulated independent by Inglehart-Welzel factor analysis (2005, 2010). Empirically in WVS wave 7 there is a residual correlation ~0.15 between TS and SE. Treated as postulated, not measured (cf. doc 11 section A3).
